zh.Attleborough, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可阿特萊包盧
zh.Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Mortimer於1323年出生在英國諾福爾可阿特萊包盧時，他的父親Robert de Mortimer29歲，母親Margery Fastolf22歲。他於大約1344年與Margery Byron在英國賀福爾維格莫結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。他去世於1378年享年55歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可。

zh-hans.Attleborough, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可阿特萊包盧
zh-hans.Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Mortimer于1323年出生在英国諾福爾可阿特萊包盧时，他的父亲Robert de Mortimer29岁，母亲Margery Fastolf22岁。他于大约1344年与Margery Byron在英国賀福爾維格莫结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。他去世于1378年享年55岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Mortimer was born in 1323, in Attleborough, Norfolk, England, his father, Robert de Mortimer, was 29 and his mother, Margery Fastolf, was 22. He married Margery Byron about 1344, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. He died in 1378, at the age of 55, and was buried in Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Mortimer est né en 1323, à Attleborough, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Mortimer, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margery Fastolf, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margery Byron environ 1344, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1378, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Mortimer 1323 in Attleborough, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Mortimer 29 und seine Mutter Margery Fastolf 22. Er hat um 1344 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England Margery Byron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Er starb 1378 im Alter von 55 Jahren und wurde in Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Mortimer è nato il nel 1323 nel Attleborough, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Robert de Mortimer, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margery Fastolf, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margery Byron circa 1344, nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì nel 1378, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Mortimerが1323年にイギリスノーフォルクアットレボロウで生まれた時，父Robert de Mortimerは29歳，母Margery Fastolfは22歳であった。約1344年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーでMargery Byronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼は1378年に55歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Mortimer(이)가 1323년 영국 노르폴크 애틀레버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Mortimer(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Fastolf(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1344년 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 Margery Byron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1378년 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Mortimer nasceu em 1323, em Attleborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Mortimer, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margery Fastolf, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Byron aproximadamente 1344, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1378, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Mortimer родился в 1323 г. в местности аттлебороую, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Mortimer было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Fastolf, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Byron около 1344 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1378 г. в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Mortimer nació en 1323, en Attleborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Mortimer, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margery Fastolf, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margery Byron aproximadamente 1344, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió en 1378, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Norfolk, Inglaterra.
